omitted_declarations.policy_reference:
By Accepting Privacy policy you are agreeing to provide the below permissions required by the application:
PRIVACY PERMISSIONS REQUIRED AND THEIR PURPOSE
• ACCESS_FINE_LOCATION – To get a precise location using both GPS_PROVIDER and NETWORK_PROVIDER.
• ACCESS_COARSE_LOCATION – The Coarse location provides less accurate locations when in a battery save mode.
• ACCESS_WIFI_STATE – To access information about Wi-Fi networks.
• ACCESS_NETWORK_STATE – To access internet connection via Direct Internet
• INTERNET – for accessing internet,SSL certificate verification.
• READ_EXTERNAL_STORAGE - To read the saved Profile image files from device gallery.
• SEND_SMS, Telephony – To verify user's mobile number.
• WRITE_EXTERNAL_STORAGE - Application requires this permission since application allowing to set the customer profile picture in the application. In this scenario, user can select the picture from the device SD card and Social sharing, PDF download, Camera access for external storage.
• CAMERA - to take picture for customer profile image purpose.
• READ_PHONE_STATE – to access sim serial number of user to provide an option to user to send an SMS from available SMS providers.
• READ_CONTACTS, WRITE_CONTACTS, GET_ACCOUNTS -Getting contact details to use Mobile to Mobile beneficiary registration.
• USE_FINGERPRINT-to provide Bio metric login authentication.
• RECEIVE_BOOT_COMPLETED, ACCESS_COARSE_LOCATION, ACCESS_FINE_LOCATION-to get location details and dependency.
• VIBRATE,GPS, ACCESS_NETWORK_STATE- To get internet information.
• READ_PHONE_STATE-To get Sim details for verification.
• BLUETOOTH-To Diagnostic plugin dependency (IOS).
• CALL_PHONE- Making phone call.
• VOICE_RECORD-To provide voice assistance service.
